name: spirii-go
title: Spirii Go
description: Find nearby Spirii Go chargers, view availability, and see prices for individual chargepoints.
author: alexandervarney

preferences.name: favoriteEvseId
preferences.title: My Chargepoint ID
preferences.description: Used by the "My Chargepoint" command for quick lookup.

preferences.name: priceGranularity
preferences.title: Price Granularity
preferences.description: How upcoming prices are aggregated in the schedule.

preferences.name: lat
preferences.title: Latitude Override
preferences.description: Optional. If set with Longitude, used instead of GPS.

preferences.name: lon
preferences.title: Longitude Override
preferences.description: Optional. If set with Latitude, used instead of GPS.

commands.name: my-chargepoint
commands.title: My Chargepoint
commands.subtitle: Spirii Go
commands.description: View status and price schedule for your saved chargepoint.
